v2_sources.title: Trastuzumab in combination with chemotherapy versus chemotherapy alone for treatment of HER2-positive advanced gastric or gastro-oesophageal junction cancer (ToGA): a phase 3, open-label, randomised controlled trial
v2_sources.citation: Trastuzumab in combination with chemotherapy versus chemotherapy alone for treatment of HER2-positive advanced gastric or gastro-oesophageal junction cancer (ToGA): a phase 3, open-label, randomised controlled trial. The Lancet. 2010.

boundary_tags.population_or_model: Patients with HER2-positive advanced gastric or gastro-oesophageal junction cancer

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'Median overall survival was significantly improved with trastuzumab plus chemotherapy (13.8 months, 95% CI 12-16) compared to chemotherapy alone (11.1 months, 95% CI 10-13); HR 0.74 (95%
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'Median overall survival was significantly improved with trastuzumab plus chemotherapy (13.8 months, 95% CI 12-16) compared to chemotherapy alone (11.1 months, 95% CI 10-13); HR 0.74 (95%

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'In patients with high HER2 expression (IHC 2+/FISH+ or IHC 3+), median overall survival was 16.0 months (95% CI 15-19) with trastuzumab plus chemotherapy vs 11.8 months (95% CI 10-13) wit
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'In patients with high HER2 expression (IHC 2+/FISH+ or IHC 3+), median overall survival was 16.0 months (95% CI 15-19) with trastuzumab plus chemotherapy vs 11.8 months (95% CI 10-13) wit

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'Progression-free survival was improved: median 6.7 months (trastuzumab + chemo) vs 5.5 months (chemo alone); HR 0.71 (95% CI 0.59-0.85), p=0.0002', 'page': 7}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'Progression-free survival was improved: median 6.7 months (trastuzumab + chemo) vs 5.5 months (chemo alone); HR 0.71 (95% CI 0.59-0.85), p=0.0002', 'page': 7}

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'Overall tumour response rate was 47% (trastuzumab + chemo) vs 35% (chemo alone), p=0.0017', 'page': 7}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'Overall tumour response rate was 47% (trastuzumab + chemo) vs 35% (chemo alone), p=0.0017', 'page': 7}

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'Adverse event profile was similar between groups; no significant increase in overall toxicity with trastuzumab. Cardiac adverse events were rare and similar between groups (6% each). Grad
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'Adverse event profile was similar between groups; no significant increase in overall toxicity with trastuzumab. Cardiac adverse events were rare and similar between groups (6% each). Grad

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'Interaction test showed significant difference in treatment effect between high vs low HER2 expression subgroups (p=0.036), suggesting greater benefit in high HER2 expression patients', '
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'Interaction test showed significant difference in treatment effect between high vs low HER2 expression subgroups (p=0.036), suggesting greater benefit in high HER2 expression patients', '
